name: ChartHop Organizational Intelligence REST API
what_it_does: ChartHop organizational intelligence REST API for HR teams, People Ops leaders, and business executives to access dynamic org charts, workforce headcount and budget planning, compensation management, performance data, and organizational analytics — enabling automated org structure visualization, headcount planning, compensation benchmarking, and people ops workflow management through ChartHop's connected people analytics platform. Enables AI agents to manage org chart for dynamic organizational structure visualization automation, handle headcount planning for workforce capacity and role planning automation, access compensation management for salary band and pay equity management automation, retrieve employee data for people directory and profile management automation, manage performance for goal and performance review data automation, handle DEI analytics for diversity representation and equity reporting automation, access scenario planning for reorg and merger org design automation, retrieve reports for people ops dashboard and custom reporting automation, manage approval workflows for headcount request and compensation change automation, and integrate ChartHop with HRIS (Workday, BambooHR), ATS, and payroll for connected people ops platform automation.
use_cases: Maintaining dynamic org chart and organizational structure for executive visibility automation agents
Planning and approving headcount changes for department budget management automation agents
Managing compensation bands and pay equity for people operations automation agents
Analyzing workforce diversity and planning reorg scenarios for organizational design automation agents
not_for: Core HR transactions (ChartHop is people analytics and planning, not HRIS for payroll or benefits)
Time and attendance (ChartHop is workforce planning and analytics, not time tracking)
Learning management (ChartHop is org intelligence, not LMS or training management)
best_when: An HR team, People Ops function, or executive leadership team wanting AI agents to visualize org structure, plan headcount and budgets, manage compensation, and analyze workforce diversity through ChartHop's connected organizational intelligence platform.
avoid_when: HRIS SYNC IS REQUIRED: ChartHop data depends on HRIS integration for live employee data; automated standalone org analytics assumption creates stale_data without HRIS sync; automated must connect ChartHop to HRIS for live organizational data. COMPANY SIZE AFFECTS FEATURES: ChartHop features and pricing vary by company size; automated unlimited features assumption creates plan_limitation for smaller companies; automated must verify features available for company size tier. SENSITIVE COMPENSATION DATA REQUIRES RBAC: Compensation data in ChartHop requires role-based access controls; automated unrestricted compensation access assumption creates privacy_violation for salary data; automated must implement appropriate RBAC for compensation visibility. SCENARIO PLANNING IS DRAFT-BASED: ChartHop reorg scenarios are draft states, not live org; automated live-reorg assumption creates confusion between planned and current org; automated must distinguish between draft scenarios and live organizational structure.

auth.notes: ChartHop uses API key + OAuth2 for org intelligence REST API. REST API with JSON. New York, NY HQ. Founded 2019 by Ian White. Products: Org Charts, Headcount Planning, Compensation Management, Performance, People Analytics, DEI. HRIS integrations: Workday, BambooHR, ADP, Rippling, Greenhouse. Backed by Andreessen Horowitz, Cowboy Ventures. Competes with OrgVue, Visier, and Lattice for people ops platform.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan for up to 150 employees (org chart only); premium features require paid subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per employee; Growth, Business, Enterprise tiers; module add-ons
pricing.notes: New York NY. a16z backed. Annual PEPM subscription. Freemium. 150+ employee companies. People ops focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; org chart and people APIs throttled per plan tier

known_agent_gotchas: FIELD DEFINITIONS ARE COMPANY-SPECIFIC: ChartHop fields can be customized per company; automated standard field assumption creates custom_field_not_found for company-specific people data fields; automated must query ChartHop field definitions before accessing company-specific data

EFFECTIVE DATE IS CRITICAL FOR ORG QUERIES: ChartHop data is time-stamped with effective dates; automated current-only assumption creates missing historical org data; automated must specify effective date for point-in-time org chart and headcount queries

COMPENSATION IS ROLE-RESTRICTED: Salary and compensation data in ChartHop is access-controlled by role; automated all-employee access assumption creates permission_denied for compensation data without appropriate role; automated must verify viewer role permissions for compensation data

SCENARIO CHANGES ARE NOT LIVE: Headcount planning scenarios in ChartHop are separate from live org; automated scenario-as-live assumption creates confusion between planned and actual headcount; automated must track which data is live vs. planned scenario

SYNC FROM HRIS IS SCHEDULED: ChartHop HRIS sync runs on schedule (hourly/daily); automated real-time HRIS data assumption creates data_lag for recent org changes; automated must account for HRIS sync schedule in time-sensitive org chart queries
agent_readiness.security_notes: Org intelligence. GDPR, CCPA, SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. Employee, compensation, and org structure data.

security_score_components.security_notes: People ops. GDPR, CCPA, SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. Employee, salary, and org chart data.
